name: open-posture
description: A privacy-first, on-device desktop posture coach.

scripts.start: node scripts/check-toolchain.cjs && npm run electron:install && npm run build && electron .
scripts.model:verify: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const crypto=require('node:crypto');const p='assets/models/pose_landmarker_lite.task';const want='59929e1d1ee95287735ddd833b19cf4ac46d29bc7afddbbf6753c459690d574a';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){throw new Error('Missing '+p)}const got=crypto.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(p)).digest('hex');if(got!==want){throw new Error('Pose model checksum mismatch: '+got)}console.log('Pose model checksum verified.')"
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:coverage && npm run model:verify && npm run build
scripts.debug: npm run electron:install && npm run build && electron . --enable-logging
